securetrace 0.1.0

securetrace

[!CAUTION] Alpha software. This package is part of a broader effort by Ian Flores Siaca to develop proper AI infrastructure for the R ecosystem. It is under active development and should not be used in production until an official release is published. APIs may change without notice.

Observability and tracing for R LLM agent workflows. Structured traces with spans, token/cost accounting, latency monitoring, and JSONL export.

Part of the secure-r-dev Ecosystem

securetrace is part of a 7-package ecosystem for building governed AI agents in R:

                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                    в”Ӯ   securer    в”Ӯ
                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ                в”Ӯ                  в”Ӯ
   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ securetools  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ secureguardв”Ӯ  в”Ӯ securecontext   в”Ӯ
   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
          в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                    в”Ӯ   orchestr   в”Ӯ
                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
          в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
          в”Ӯ                                  в”Ӯ
  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ                  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
  в”Ӯ>>> securetrace<<<в”Ӯ                 в”Ӯ securebench  в”Ӯ
  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

securetrace provides the observability layer at the bottom of the stack. It instruments LLM calls, tool executions, and guardrail checks with structured traces, token/cost accounting, and JSONL export вҖ“ giving visibility into what your agents are doing and how much it costs.

Package Role
securer Sandboxed R execution with tool-call IPC
securetools Pre-built security-hardened tool definitions
secureguard Input/code/output guardrails (injection, PII, secrets)
orchestr Graph-based agent orchestration
securecontext Document chunking, embeddings, RAG retrieval
securetrace Structured tracing, token/cost accounting, JSONL export
securebench Guardrail benchmarking with precision/recall/F1 metrics

Installation 

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("ian-flores/securetrace")

Quick Start 

library(securetrace)

result <- with_trace("my-agent", exporter = jsonl_exporter("traces.jsonl"), {
  with_span("llm-call", type = "llm", {
    record_tokens(1500, 300, model = "claude-sonnet-4-5")
    "The answer is 42"
  })
})

Features

  • Structured traces вҖ“ OpenTelemetry-inspired traces and spans for R
  • Token accounting вҖ“ Track input/output tokens per span
  • Cost calculation вҖ“ Built-in pricing for Claude and GPT models
  • JSONL export вҖ“ Write traces to structured log files
  • Context management вҖ“ Automatic trace/span stacking with with_trace() / with_span()
  • Integration helpers вҖ“ Wrappers for LLM calls, tool executions, and guardrail checks
